subject: Defeat: {home} {score} {away}
body:
Tough loss today, coach. We lost to {opponent} {score}.

There are things to learn from this match. Let's review where we went wrong and come back stronger.

The season is long — we'll bounce back.

es.subject: Derrota: {home} {score} {away}
es.body:
Dura derrota hoy, jefe. Perdimos contra {opponent} {score}.

Hay cosas que aprender de este partido. Revisemos dónde nos equivocamos y volvamos más fuertes.

La temporada es larga — nos recuperaremos.
